Itslearning.RestApi.Entities.Personal.Course.CourseParticipantUnenrolled

Class representing a participant in a course

NameDescriptionTypeAdditional information
PersonId

The id of the course participant

 integer

None.
FullName

Full name of the course participant

 string

None.
TemporaryAccess

When the course participant was deleted

 boolean

None.
DateUnenrolled

When the course participant was deleted

 date

None.
DateUnenrolledRelative

When the course participant was deleted from course relative to the current time Examples: 3 days ago, 2 hours ago, Just now, etc.

 string

None.
MemberOfCourseGroups

Full name of the course groups

 string

None.
PictureUrl

Avatar Url

 string

None.
AssessmentUrl

Url to assessment record

 string

None.
ExtraInformation

 string

None.
